x-enumeration-literals.name: Redeemed
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Certificate has been successfully redeemed.

Comment:
Customer redeems the gift card for an Amazon purchase.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Certificate invalidated due to program rules, fraud, or participant ineligibility.

Comment:
Certificate revoked because the account was closed or misuse detected.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expired
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Certificate reached its expiration date without being redeemed.

Comment:
$50 gift card not used within 12 months.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Certificate has been issued but not yet redeemed.

Comment:
Customer receives a $50 gift card after completing a transaction; not yet used.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspended
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Redemption temporarily blocked due to issues.

Comment:
Certificate pending verification of authentication or system maintenance.
